chapter_title.en: The Chapter on the Virtues of Prayer

text: 628 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «أَقْرَبُ مَا يَكُونَ اَلْعَبْدُ إِلَى اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ هُوَ سَاجِدٌ

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.628 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"The closest a servant is to Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic, is when he is in prostration (Sujood)”.
